title: Green Apple
description: Adds green apples with all the features of the original red apples.
body:
This mod introduces a new item: Green Apple. It functions the same as a regular apple, with the only difference being its unique texture.

Green Apples have a 50% chance of dropping from oak or dark oak leaves instead of regular apples.
![Green apple drops from oak leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34c1b5c2b9b90889d95f8907bc42634de69f2f48_0.webp)

You can craft a Golden Apple by combining one Green Apple with eight gold ingots.
![Golden apple craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9b3a7f74e35ebd1f104e0ed759a75a531a84027.png)

Green Apples cannot be found in structures.

### Requirements:
- Requires Fabric API.

### Mod Features:
- Supports 93 languages (translation by ChatGPT).
- Since version 0.1.1, you can feed Green Apples to horses and use them in the composter.
